text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio makes it a routine to watch replays of
Mejiro McQueen's races before training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she still can't grasp what it is that
makes McQueen so different.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having reached a conclusion myself, I explain
what I believe she lacks: the will to crawl her way
back up from rock bottom.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This realization hits Teio hard. However, she
knows she needs to face the facts if she's going to
get stronger and work towards her goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio accepts that she lost against Mejiro
McQueen. She uses that frustration as a
springboard to grow even further.
